Rooted in faith · Driven by love
The Challenge

Poverty managed,
not permanently reduced.

In Rwanda, too many vulnerable families survive day to day with no path forward — no health protection, no capital, no opportunity. Kimuntu Rising walks beside them with love, compassion, and practical support that changes lives for good.

  • No Health Protection

    Vulnerable families face illness with no insurance, pushing them deeper into poverty

  • No Capital to Start

    Women with talent and drive have no access to even the smallest startup funds

  • Invisible to Support Systems

    The most vulnerable families are often overlooked by aid programmes and institutions

  • Surviving, Not Living

    Families get by day to day with no vision, no dignity, and no path to a better life

"Poverty is often managed rather than permanently reduced — we change that."

Community session — Rwanda, 2026
On The Ground

Where Transformation
Actually Happens

Real families. Real love. Real change — one act of compassion at a time in Rwanda.

Our Approach

Love in Action —
Our 3 Pillars of Support

Rooted in Christian values, we believe every person deserves dignity, health, and the opportunity to build a better life. We act on that belief — practically and compassionately.

1

Love & Compassion

Our Foundation
  • Grounded in Christian faith and human dignity
  • We see people — not problems
  • Every family is treated with care and respect
  • No one is too small or too forgotten to matter
2

Health & Security

First Step
  • Mutuelle de Santé coverage for vulnerable families
  • Peace of mind before economic growth
  • Protecting families from health-related poverty
  • A foundation of stability to build upon
3

Business & Livelihood

Lasting Change
  • Startup capital for women-led micro-businesses
  • Moving women from street vending to owning their own business
  • Real income that changes daily life
  • Dignity through self-reliance, not dependency
What We Do

How We Change Lives

Simple, targeted, and deeply human. We begin with what matters most — and grow from there with integrity and faith.

01

Rise Mind Program

Focus: Personal Transformation

A deep-dive into the inner work. Participants undergo mindset and behavioral change coaching, trauma-informed support, and leadership development to rebuild identity and purpose.

Mindset Coaching Trauma Healing Leadership
02

Skills-to-Income Program

Focus: Employability & Income Creation

Market-driven vocational and digital skills training paired with real apprenticeships and practical income-generating projects linked to actual job market demand.

Vocational Skills Digital Training Apprenticeships
03

Micro-Enterprise Incubation

Focus: Business Creation & Sustainability

From idea to operating business. Participants receive startup support, business training, access to seed capital through group-based savings, and continuous mentorship.

Startup Support Seed Capital Mentorship
04

Community Impact Network

Focus: Long-Term Sustainability

Alumni become mentors. A peer support and opportunity-sharing ecosystem that sustains transformation beyond the program — creating lasting community-level change.

Peer Support Alumni Network Opportunity Hub

To Beneficiaries
Real People. Real Change.

Faces of Transformation

Behind every number is a life rebuilt — women who traded vulnerability for enterprise, dependency for dignity.

Market Entrepreneur

From the Street to a Stable Business

She was a street fruit vendor — working long hours with no security, no shelter, and no guarantee of income from one day to the next. Kimuntu Rising is walking beside her, providing the startup capital she needs to open a proper small business, earn steadily, and build a stable future for her family.

6mo from street vending to a stable, formal business
Agataro Business

Craft Turned into Capital

Traditional Rwandan craftsmanship — agataro basket weaving — is a God-given skill that deserves a real market. Kimuntu Rising believes in women who create with their hands, supporting them to grow their craft into dignified, sustainable livelihoods.

12mo business survival rate — our benchmark for lasting impact
Who We Serve

Reaching the Most Vulnerable

We focus specifically on those overlooked by conventional development programs.

Street-Connected Youth

Young people living and working on the streets who need both immediate support and long-term pathways

Orphans & Vulnerable Youth

Young people without family support systems who need stable foundations to build upon

Unemployed Youth (18–35)

Educated or uneducated youth stuck in unemployment who need practical pathways to income

Low-Income Women & Single Mothers

Women carrying economic and family responsibilities who need targeted economic empowerment

Marginalized Households

Socially and economically excluded families who need systemic support to break the poverty cycle

Those God Places Before Us

We trust that as we faithfully serve those in front of us, God will open doors to reach more families across Rwanda and beyond

"We are not here to manage poverty — we are here to love people into a better life. From the street to a stable business, from survival to dignity, one family at a time."
— Kimuntu Rising Mission Statement
Our First Steps

The Pilot Phase

We start small, move with integrity, and grow with evidence. Here is exactly where Kimuntu Rising stands today.

Program Overview

3 Families.
Growing With Faith.

A tight, measurable pilot that proves the transformation model works — generating the evidence base needed for full-scale funding and replication.

Phase 1: Beneficiary selection and onboarding
Month 1–2: Mindset transformation (Rise Mind Program)
Step 2: Startup capital provided to first woman beneficiary — a street fruit vendor transitioning into her own stable, formal small business
Month 4–6: Business incubation and income generation
Ongoing: Mentorship, follow-up and performance tracking

Ready to Build
Something Lasting?

Join us in this mission of love and compassion. Every contribution — however small — pays health insurance for a family, funds a woman's first business, and plants a seed of lasting change.

Partner With Us View Pilot Plan
Transparent & Accountable
Results in 6 Months
Community-Led Impact
Funding Used Directly
Support the Mission

Give the Gift of a New Beginning

Every contribution — however small — is an act of love that changes a real family's life in Rwanda.

You don't need to be wealthy to make a difference. A small, faithful gift can pay a family's health insurance, help a woman launch her first business, and open a door that was previously closed forever.

  • Covers Mutuelle de Santé A small gift pays a full year of community health insurance for one family — protecting them from medical poverty
  • Funds a Woman's First Business Startup capital helps a street vendor transition into a stable, legal small business — earning steadily and with dignity
  • Grows With Every Gift As donations grow, so does our reach — more families, deeper support, and wider community transformation

"Every man shall give as he is able, according to the blessing of the LORD your God which He has given you." — Deuteronomy 16:17

Make a Donation
Give freely, from the heart — any amount is welcome and deeply appreciated. We will contact you to confirm how your gift will be received.
$

Give what your heart leads you to — $1 or $1,000, every contribution is a blessing and will be used with care.

Your information is safe. We will contact you to arrange the transfer.

Thank You & God Bless You!

Your donation intent has been received. We will reach out to within 48 hours to confirm how your gift will be received and put to work for a family in Rwanda.
